info.description: HTTP API contract owned by nova-gateway.
info.title: Nova Gateway API

post.summary: Login with phone and SMS code
Login with WeChat Mini Program code

get.summary: List posts owned by the authenticated user

200.description: Current user's post detail, including drafts.

get.summary: Get a post owned by the authenticated user

LogoutRequest.description: Either access_token or refresh_token is required. If access_token is omitted, the gateway uses the bearer token.

File.description: File stored by the file service.

object_key.description: Stable relative storage key, for example avatars/2026/06/a.png.

FileScene.description: Business scene for a stored file.

FileStatus.description: Lifecycle state of a stored file.

id.description: Public post id used in URLs.

cover_url.description: Browser-readable cover image URL, for example /uploads/post-covers/2026/07/a.png.

can_manage.description: Whether the authenticated caller can manage this post.

PostUser.description: User display fields populated by nova-gateway from nova-user.

CreatePostInput.description: Post fields accepted when creating a post.

cover_url.description: Cover image object key or /uploads URL returned by file upload.

UpdatePostInput.description: Mutable post fields accepted when updating a post.

cover_url.description: Cover image object key or /uploads URL returned by file upload.

User.description: Public profile and account state for a user.

PublicUser.description: Public user profile fields safe for anonymous reads.

UserStatus.description: Lifecycle state of a user account.

UserInput.description: Mutable user profile fields accepted by the gateway.

avatar.description: Avatar object key or /uploads URL returned by avatar upload.
